Html:
Hello all,
I came to download the the v4.60 64-bit Service edition today; I noticed the link for it incorrectly points to the 32-bit edition and some other download-related problems

Raw documentation is at the end.
Summary:
  • The 64-bit Service Edition links on Jounin.net and CodePlex incorrectly point to Tftpd32_SE-4.60-setup.exe (32-bit Service Edition)
    • https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/releases/view/630491/
    • http://tftpd32.jounin.net/tftpd32_download.html
  • The 32-bit Service Edition link also downloads a file with the same name: Tftpd32_SE-4.60-setup.exe; however it is not an identical package.
  • Though not listed, the 64-bit Service Edition is available on Jounin.net: http://tftpd32.jounin.net/download/Tftpd64_SE-4.60-setup.exe
  • The remaining filenames and links from Jounin.net and Codeplex correctly match their versions/editions/target OS.
CodePlex Download Links
Labeled Edition     URL                                             
32-bit  Installer   https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/downloads/get/1632549
32-bit  Portable    https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/downloads/get/1632548
32-bit  Service     https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/downloads/get/1632551
64-bit  Installer   https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/downloads/get/1632563
64-bit  Portable    https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/downloads/get/1632564
64-bit  Service     https://tftpd64.codeplex.com/downloads/get/1632565

Thanks!
Great; thanks for all your hard work.
